driver = @pytest.mark.smoke @allure.title("TC01 - Verify Login and Dashboard Load") def test_login_grandrest(driver): wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 40) # ---------------- OPEN TENANT PAGE ---------------- driver.get( "https://app-hire-x-dev-multi-tenant-angular-01-bkgee7ewapa0c5es.southeastasia-01.azurewebsites.net/webshopnotfound" ) #
